attrval.name: Alt-text, accessibility act
attrval.textval: Bosch sanding plate 93 mm for oscillating tools.

cltextval.clText2000: Bosch sanding plate 93 mm for oscillating tools.
Bosch Schleifteller 93 mm für oszillierende Werkzeuge.

attrval.name: Alt-text, accessibility act
attrval.textval: Bosch 93 mm sanding plate for long life use.

cltextval.clText2000: Bosch 93 mm sanding plate for long life use.

attrval.textval: Bosch Box Level 12 cm with robust construction.
